raw.message: Everyone thinks Match 3 is boring... until they try Jolly Match😀

hook.summary: A hand triggers a power-up on a grid of rabbit tiles, causing a satisfying explosion.
hook.visual_action: A finger taps a purple and gold rocket-like power-up, clearing a cross-shaped section of tiles to reveal colorful gems.

scene_flow: A hand hovers over a grid of rabbit-engraved tiles with a central power-up.
The hand taps the power-up, triggering a cross-shaped explosion that clears tiles.
Colorful gems and items are revealed beneath the cleared tiles.
The sequence loops, emphasizing the satisfying clearing mechanic.
audience_proxy: Casual puzzle enthusiasts who enjoy satisfying tile-clearing mechanics and cute aesthetics.
